tools.name: send_whatsapp_buttons
tools.description: Send a WhatsApp message with up to 3 reply buttons (botones de respuesta rápida). The user taps a button and you receive an interactive.button_reply event in the webhook. Useful for confirmations like

tools.name: send_whatsapp_list
tools.description:
Send a WhatsApp list-picker menu (menú de lista de WhatsApp), a button that opens a sectioned list of options. The user picks one and you receive an interactive.list_reply event.

Use for menus with 4

tools.name: send_whatsapp_media
tools.description:

tools.name: send_whatsapp_template
tools.description: Send an APPROVED WhatsApp template message (enviar plantilla de WhatsApp). Required for any message OUTSIDE the 24-hour customer service window, i.e. proactive notifications, transactional updates, ma

tools.name: send_whatsapp_text
tools.description: Send a free-form WhatsApp text message (enviar mensaje de WhatsApp, mandar un WhatsApp). Use for replies INSIDE the 24-hour customer service window (after the user has messaged you within the last 24h

adapters.name: WhatsAppClient
adapters.purpose: HTTP client over Meta Graph API for WhatsApp Cloud.

webhooks.name: parseWebhookEvent
webhooks.purpose: Parse Meta's nested webhook envelope into a normalized event (single).

webhooks.name: parseWebhookEvents
webhooks.purpose: Parse all events from a batched webhook payload (Meta can send 3+ status updates per POST).

webhooks.name: verifyWebhookSignature
webhooks.purpose: HMAC-SHA256 verification of X-Hub-Signature-256 header. Pass RAW body.

webhooks.name: verifyWebhookSubscription
webhooks.purpose: Handle Meta's GET handshake with hub.challenge / hub.verify_token.
